prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-10LBSBBPAYDIRTKIT-24PC-BLK-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 24pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket and 10lbs Bobby Bo Intermediate Gold Paydirt, Black Description: For the gold prospector, novice or veteran, who wants to continue to practice their gold panning skills, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 24pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket and 10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt.

With a focus on gold panning specifically, the 10lb bag of intermediate to advanced paydirt is a surefire way to develop and enhance gold panning skills and techniques, as well as classification work, without requiring a trip to a claim site. That being said, all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit are valuable and useful tools, which can be used time and time again for processing, collection, examination and storage of found gold or other valuable items in the field come future gold prospecting excursions.

The 10lb bag of ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks on the intermediate and advanced paydirt scale, curated for the more experienced prospector. This paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work.

This gold panning kit comes with the following gold prospecting equipment: 10 and 12 inch dual riffles pans (need to be seasoned before use), 10 inch preseasoned finishing pan, 14 preseasoned inch prospecting pan, 5 gallon bucket, classifier screens (1/2, 1/4 and 1/8 inch), snifter bottles, glass storage vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel and testing stone. Search Terms: gold panning pay dirt paydirt kit set sluice bucket mining prospecting pan tools equipment waterproof shovel outdoors rock hounding hobby camping gear goldrush extract five gallon recovery testing travel backpack adult fathers day Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT: Develop gold panning skills and techniques with the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 10lbs Paydirt Kit! While the paydirt is intended for practicing gold panning skills at home, this kit includes useful gold prospecting equipment that can later be taken to the field for processing unclassified raw materials - 10LB GOLD PAYDIRT: 10lb bag of Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks between intermediate and advanced paydirt for the more experienced prospector; paydirt features fine gold, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work - 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens; stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless material classification system, ideal for removing unwanted material from paydirt concentrate - GOLD PANS: 10 and 12 inch dual riffle gold pans have shallow and deep riffles for processing various kinds of material in one pan; pre-seasoned 10 inch pan is ideal for cleanup of concentrates; large pre-seasoned 14 inch prospecting pan is best suited for processing large amounts of raw material in the field - PROSPECTING TOOLS: Recovery equipment includes snifter bottles, glass vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel, testing stone and 1/8, 1/4 and 1/20 classifier screens === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 24pc Gold Panning Kit 10lbs Black

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 24pc 10lb Black Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10Lb Bobby Bo Paydirt, 5 Gallon Bucket, Gold Pans, Classifier Screens, Magnetic Separator, Recovery Tools

openai.title_differentiation: Intermediate Paydirt, 5 Gallon Bucket, 10 And 12 Inch Dual Riffle Pans, Classifier Screens, Recovery Tools
